theme: First Day at a New Job

sentences.english: Starting a new job is both exciting and nerve-wracking.
sentences.korean: 새 직장을 시작하는 것은 설레기도 하고 긴장되기도 해요.

sentences.english: On my first day I arrived thirty minutes early because I didn't want to be late.
sentences.korean: 첫날 늦고 싶지 않아서 30분 일찍 도착했어요.

sentences.english: My manager gave me a tour of the office and introduced me to the team.
Everyone was friendly and a coworker offered to have lunch with me.
sentences.korean: 모두 친절했고 동료가 같이 점심을 먹자고 했어요.

sentences.english: By the end of the day I felt much more comfortable and confident.
sentences.korean: 하루가 끝날 때쯤 훨씬 더 편안하고 자신감이 생겼어요.
